ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pitchers" (
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the pitcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the pitcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the pitcher (e.g., SP, RP) */,
  "pitching_hand" TEXT /* Pitching hand (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the pitcher (True if active, False if inactive) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the pitcher */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the pitcher */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the pitcher */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the pitcher was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the pitcher was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the pitcher's current contract started */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the pitcher's current contract ends */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the pitcher's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitchers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., MLB, AAA) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team (e.g., East, Central) */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of pitching statistics */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game or performance */,
  "ip" REAL /* Innings pitched */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Hits allowed */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Runs allowed */,
  "er" INTEGER /* Earned runs allowed */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* Base on balls (walks) allowed */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Strikeouts */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Home runs allowed */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per inning pitched */,
  "fpts" REAL /* Fantasy points scored */,
  "bs" INTEGER /* Blown saves */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number in the season */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown */,
  "strikeouts_per_nine_innings" REAL /* Strikeouts per nine innings */,
  "walks_per_nine_innings" REAL /* Walks per nine innings */,
  "hits_per_nine_innings" REAL /* Hits per nine innings */,
  "ground_balls" INTEGER /* Number of ground balls allowed */,
  "fly_balls" INTEGER /* Number of fly balls allowed */,
  "line_drives" INTEGER /* Number of line drives allowed */,
  "pop_ups" INTEGER /* Number of pop-ups allowed */,
  "gb_fb_ratio" REAL /* Ground ball to fly ball ratio */,
  "balks" INTEGER /* Number of balks */,
  "pickoffs" INTEGER /* Number of pickoffs */,
  "pickoff_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of pickoff attempts */,
  "holds" INTEGER /* Number of holds */,
  "win" INTEGER /* True if the pitcher won the game, False otherwise */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* True if the pitcher lost the game, False otherwise */,
  "save" INTEGER /* True if the pitcher saved the game, False otherwise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_statistics_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES pitchers ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Home Win, Away Win) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature at the start of the game */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed during the game */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the game */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the home plate umpire */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home plate umpire */,
  "tv_channel" TEXT /* TV channel broadcasting the game */,
  "attendance_record" INTEGER /* True if the game set an attendance record, False otherwise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "success" INTEGER /* True if the access was successful, False otherwise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES pitchers ("pitcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
